name: Statue pedestal
description: A three-tiered monumental pedestal crowned with an armor-stand statue. Tier 1 is a 3x1x3 @accent base; tier 2 is a 2x1x2 @accent course centred on it; tier 3 is a single @accent capstone. A `minecraft:armor_stand` stands on the capstone as the statue itself. A `minecraft:lectern` sits at the front of the base as an inscription plaque, four @fence posts at the base corners carry decorative torches, and (when the AABB is wider than 3x3) a @carpet pad surrounds the plinth as an ornamental border.

required_furniture.rule: Three stacked @accent courses centred inside the AABB: 3x1x3 at y0, 2x1x2 at y0+1, and 1x1x1 at y0+2. Tier widths shrink monotonically so the pedestal reads as a stepped pyramid.
Single 1x1x1 @accent block at y0+2 sitting on the geometric centre column; serves as the plinth for the statue above.
One `minecraft:armor_stand` at y0+3 directly on top of the capstone — the 'statue' itself.
One `minecraft:lectern` at y0 on the front (+z) face of the base, facing the pedestal; reads as an inscription stone / text plaque. Falls back to the -z side when there is no room on +z.
Four @fence posts at the base corners (pushed one cell outward into the courtyard pad when room exists) with a `minecraft:torch` on top — `minecraft:sea_lantern` in the fantasy style.

@carpet Rect at y0 covering the full AABB; only emitted when the AABB is wider or deeper than the 3x3 base so the carpet reads as a ring around the plinth (the base tile overwrites the centre cells via later-wins dedupe).

placement_rules: Pedestal centred inside the AABB; surplus footprint becomes a carpet pad around it.
Corner @fence + torch posts are pushed one cell outward into the surrounding pad when the AABB allows it.
Lectern plaque sits on the +z (south) face of the base by default; it falls back to the -z face when the AABB has no front clearance.
lighting_ventilation: Four corner torches (sea_lantern in fantasy) frame the pedestal and meet the night-light budget for an outdoor monument; the plinth is solid and does not require ventilation.

medieval.notes: Stone-brick tiered plinth with cobblestone-wall corner posts and red carpet ring — the heraldic statue at the centre of a castle plaza.

modern.notes: Smooth-quartz pyramid with iron-bar posts and gray carpet pad — civic memorial in a polished plaza.

furniture_overrides.override: Sea-lantern caps instead of vanilla torches: bright End-themed light beacons on dark-oak fence posts.

fantasy.notes: Purpur tiered pedestal, dark-oak posts capped with sea_lanterns, purple-carpet ring — a shrine to an arcane saint.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.statue_pedestal.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
